commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an empty/whitespace guard in Memory Wiki Related block refresh, regression tests for zero-byte and whitespace-only source pages, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows empty grouped Markdown files become page summaries, then Related refresh feeds them to a helper that emits a managed-only block; the PR also reports pre-fix local and Crabbox repros.
commands.review_followup: Draft maintainer PR with a protected label and an overlapping open contributor PR, so the next step is maintainer canonical-branch review rather than an automated repair lane.
